Implemented M11 station overlay render and hit priority above hydrology while keeping active hydrology MVT/river layers registered and clickable. Station point/cluster interactive layer ids now precede hydrology hit layers, hover/click dispatch checks station hits before river hits, cluster-over-river clicks expand/flyTo without opening river or station popups, and exposed river pixels still dispatch river forecast. Added #660 OpenSpec fixture and checked tasks 3.1-3.3. Reviewer approved and suggested direct cluster-over-river coverage; verifier refuted the gap after the test was strengthened with [riverFeature, clusterFeature] evidence. Implemented M11 draggable coexisting river/station curve windows. Added shared M11DraggableCurveWindow with header-only drag, viewport clamping, active z-index, identity-based reset, non-overlapping defaults, and migrated river forecast/station forcing panels. Overview and basin-detail click handlers now allow river/station popups to coexist and close independently. Review loop caught and resolved missing overview route coexistence coverage, zero-rect-only clamp/reachability evidence, and stale same-basin null-selected station fallback after URL version drift; final fallback now requires basinMetadataMatchesQuery before using URL basinVersionId.
